scope: AgenC lifecycle cleanup registry and daemon shutdown signal handling mapped from the donor cleanup/signal utilities.
_sourceRootBrandingAllow: branding-scan: allow donor source root path

requiredBehaviors: cleanup tasks can be registered and unregistered
shutdown cleanup runs exactly once even when called repeatedly
cleanup failures are captured without skipping the remaining tasks
edgeCases: reverse registration order preserves dependent teardown

requiredBehaviors: SIGINT, SIGTERM, and SIGHUP are routed through one structured shutdown event
SIGTERM exits as orderly shutdown while SIGINT and SIGHUP preserve interrupt exit code semantics
later signals are ignored once shutdown has started
edgeCases: signal listeners are removed when the first shutdown signal is observed
callers can dispose listeners without waiting for a signal

requiredBehaviors: foreground daemon shutdown closes JSON-RPC connections
foreground daemon shutdown terminates commandExec child processes
foreground daemon shutdown stops background agents so session shutdown flushes durable state and closes MCP connections
background agent cleanup attempts bootstrap/session shutdown even when control shutdown fails
daemon shutdown waits for in-flight agent creation before collecting agents to stop
foreground daemon shutdown flushes daemon-visible agent snapshots to durable state
foreground daemon shutdown closes the Unix socket and removes daemon.pid
edgeCases: SIGHUP follows the cleanup path and returns the interrupt exit code
signals observed during startup do not write daemon.pid or advertise the daemon as running
an agent.create racing with daemon shutdown cannot leave a new agent/session alive after cleanup
cleanup failures are surfaced and convert orderly shutdown to a non-zero exit
cleanup is idempotent between signal-triggered cleanup and finally cleanup
one background agent stop failure cannot prevent later agents from being stopped and closed
daemon intake closes before command and agent resources are torn down

requiredBehaviors: shutdown signals have stable human-readable summaries without requiring a renderer
SIGHUP summaries explicitly identify terminal-loss shutdown
edgeCases: React/Ink rendering is not carried into the runtime lifecycle layer
